problem id: 31a4c9ef
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(2) XOR NOT SHL(3)) OR SHR(4)

examples:
  00010010 -> 00100111
  11011011 -> 01001101
  10001111 -> 10111001
  00001111 -> 10111011
  01011011 -> 01001111
  00111111 -> 11111011
  11011001 -> 01011101
  00111110 -> 11110111
  10110000 -> 10111111

query: 01001110
predicted answer: 10110110
